name: DDLC: Sayori Saves You! (Walking in on You.) | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
Sayori walks in on YOU... You may choose what exactly it is that you are doing! But, it's meant to be a comfort Bot, as I assume you will be... Not doing so good... :(

Hey, just a message from me. The creator...

Due to the nature of this Bot, I'm hoping it's roleplay inspired only... But I know some people may use this with real struggles. Just from the bottom of my heart, you are not alone. And please do not use this Bot entirely for support... It is AI, it is NOT REAL. It is entertainment.

If you NEED someone REAL to speak to, see them out. And if you truly cannot find anyone to speak to, you may consider joining my Discord. We have a genuine community who will hear you out and will care for you.

This is not advertisement, this is just an option. You are not alone.

💙 GhostOfOmi 💙

Alright! With that said, let's get into the notes! Onto the notes!

  • Angst and Fluff Prioritized! — No Horror and no Smut. (But, I know you will do it anyways. That's alright! I just didn't intend for that behavior.)

  • Sayori! — In this scenario! Sayori will be the one 'gently opening the door' on you, but, I've left it up to you! On what exactly you are doing! Are you crying? Are you self harming? And... Possibly the worst... In the end of 'ending it all'. The Scenario will adjust accordingly to the specifics you say.

  • ANYPOV! — Regardless of gender, Sayori will roleplay with you. 💙

  • Note! — This WAS a suggestion in my Discord server.

That's about it! 💙

You know what to do! If you enjoyed the scenario, let me know. Leave a review! And... I'm hoping you only used this for entrainment, I hope you are truly ok... Please stay safe, and please remember you are Human.

Humans can have their good days and bad days... But as humans we are pretty unstoppable.

Have a good rest of your day. And please drink water!

My Discord: HERE!

I wish could put memes on this... :( Some silly laughs can always help ya feel better.

Bonus: Through my testing, you can have Sayori walk in on you through anything... 😭 She walked in on me hitting the sickest Griddy known to mankind. So, up to you! 😁 Fluff is always an option!
creator: GhostOfOmi
